scripts.build: pnpm check:boundaries && pnpm routes:generate && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.build:pages: pnpm check:boundaries && pnpm routes:generate && tsc -b && vite build --mode pages && node ./scripts/postbuild-pages.mjs dist-pages
scripts.biome:lint: biome lint package.json components.json vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts steiger.config.js openapi.config.mjs orval.config.mjs scripts tests src showcase/src packages/create-tanvite/package.json packages/create-tanvite/src
scripts.biome:lint:fix: biome lint --write package.json components.json vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts steiger.config.js openapi.config.mjs orval.config.mjs scripts tests src showcase/src packages/create-tanvite/package.json packages/create-tanvite/src
scripts.biome:format: biome format --write package.json components.json vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts steiger.config.js openapi.config.mjs orval.config.mjs scripts tests src showcase/src packages/create-tanvite/package.json packages/create-tanvite/src
scripts.biome:check: biome check package.json components.json vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts steiger.config.js openapi.config.mjs orval.config.mjs scripts tests src showcase/src packages/create-tanvite/package.json packages/create-tanvite/src
